---
title: "Hai-lights"
listing:
  contents: .
  sort:
    - "date desc"
    - "title desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
body-classes: hailights-page
format:
  html:
    css: ../styles.css
    title-block-banner: true
---

Hai-lights cover a range of subjects in the industry and personal observations.
